data.title: OceanPal, a US-listed company, disclosed that it holds approximately 51.3 million NEAR tokens.
data.description: According to PRNewswire, Nasdaq-listed digital asset management operator OceanPal released its annual financial report, disclosing that its balance sheet holds approximately 51.3 million NEAR tokens, with an additional 2.85 million NEAR tokens used as collateral for derivatives positions.

data.title: Iranian president says no preemptive strikes but will retaliate
data.description: Iranian President Peskov posted on social media today (March 28) that Iran will not launch a preemptive attack, but if its infrastructure or economic centers are attacked, Iran will retaliate strongly. He warned that regional countries, if they wish to achieve development and security, should not allow Iran's adversaries to use their territory to launch attacks against Iran. (CCTV International News)

data.title: Goldman Sachs Holds Significant XRP ETF Position Amid Weak Performance
data.description:
Goldman Sachs has disclosed a substantial holding of approximately $152 million in XRP ETFs, making it the largest institutional investor in this sector. According to PANews, the financial giant currently holds four XRP ETF products: Bitwise XRP ETF ($39.8 million), Franklin XRP Trust ($38.5 million), Grayscale XRP ETF ($38 million), and 21Shares XRP ETF ($35.9 million), collectively accounting for about 73% of the top 30 institutional investors' total holdings.

Despite this significant investment, XRP's recent performance remains weak. Market sentiment is cautious, and technically, XRP has formed a bearish flag pattern, indicating a potential downside of around 50%. Analysts suggest that while institutional allocations reflect long-term confidence, XRP faces considerable short-term adjustment risks due to macroeconomic pressures and weakening capital flows.

data.title: Polymarket and Parti Collaborate to Launch Live Prediction Market Platform
data.description: Polymarket has partnered with the live streaming platform Parti to introduce a live prediction market platform. According to ChainCatcher, this integration allows content creators to showcase Polymarket's markets on the Parti platform, enabling fans to engage in real-time trading on topics such as Bitcoin prices, sports events, and political discussions without leaving the platform.

data.title: Iran's Revolutionary Guards: Missile Strikes Destroy U.S. Military Assets in Saudi Arabia
data.description: According to Jin10, Iran's Revolutionary Guards have claimed responsibility for a missile attack on a U.S. military base located in Ha'il, Saudi Arabia. The attack, which began on the evening of March 27, reportedly resulted in the destruction of two U.S. refueling aircraft and significant damage to three others, rendering them inoperable. Additionally, a U.S. support vessel was targeted in the assault. The information was reported by Iran's Tasnim News Agency, citing a spokesperson from the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters of Iran's armed forces.

data.title: The Iranian military claims to have struck two US "hidden strongholds" in Dubai.
data.description: On March 28 local time, a spokesperson for the Hatem Anbia Central Command of the Iranian Armed Forces stated that in the past few hours, the Iranian military launched missile and drone strikes against two US "hidden bases" in Dubai, UAE, claiming that they had caused serious US casualties. The spokesperson also stated that as Iran continues its attacks on US bases in the Middle East, some US soldiers have been transferred from the bases to external hiding places. The two "hidden bases" in Dubai house over 400 and over 100 US soldiers respectively. The US has not yet responded. (CCTV News)

data.title: Iran's President Vows Strong Retaliation Against Attacks on Infrastructure
data.description: Iran's President has reiterated that any attacks on the country's infrastructure and economic centers will be met with strong retaliation. According to Jin10, the statement underscores Iran's commitment to defending its critical assets amid ongoing regional tensions. The President emphasized the importance of safeguarding national interests and warned against any aggressive actions that could destabilize the region.

data.title: Iran's President: Regional Development and Security Depend on Preventing Enemy Warfare
data.description: Iran's President has issued a statement to regional countries, emphasizing that achieving development and security is contingent upon not allowing enemies to launch warfare from their territories. According to Jin10, the President highlighted the importance of regional cooperation to prevent external forces from instigating conflict. This statement underscores Iran's stance on maintaining stability and security in the region by discouraging foreign military interventions.

data.title: U.S. Senators Propose Ban on Sports Bets in CFTC-Regulated Markets
data.description: U.S. senators are drafting legislation aimed at prohibiting sports bets and casino-style contracts on prediction markets regulated by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). According to NS3.AI, sports contracts could represent up to 90% of event-contract activity on platforms such as Kalshi and Polymarket. The ongoing debate involves CFTC rulemaking, state court actions, and a wider discussion on whether these products should be classified as federally supervised derivatives or gambling.

data.title: First Chatham Bank Settles Data Breach Lawsuit for $475,000
data.description: First Chatham Bank has agreed to a $475,000 settlement in response to a class action lawsuit related to a data breach that occurred in September 2024. According to NS3.AI, eligible class members who submit valid claims can expect to receive approximately $100 each on a pro rata basis. The deadline for submitting compensation claims is June 3rd, with a final approval hearing scheduled for June 18th.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenClaw to Adopt MCP for Enhanced Messaging Compatibility
data.description: OpenClaw founder Peter Steinberger announced on the X platform that the next version of OpenClaw will incorporate the Model Context Protocol (MCP). According to PANews, this update will allow users to replace Anthropic's messaging channel model context protocol, thereby connecting with a broader range of messaging providers. Steinberger acknowledged that this change is "somewhat awkward," but emphasized that it will significantly enhance OpenClaw's messaging integration capabilities and ecosystem compatibility. In response to community concerns about OpenClaw's perceived bias towards OpenAI, Steinberger clarified that OpenClaw supports a variety of software, including Microsoft's Teams, Matrix, and WhatsApp.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list R2 Protocol (R2) on March 30th.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Alpha will list R2 Protocol (R2) on March 30th. Eligible users can claim the airdrop using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha event page after trading opens on Alpha. Further details will be announced separately.

data.title: Iranian President Praises Pakistan's Peace Efforts, Calls for Trust in Negotiations
data.description: Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi has commended Pakistan for its efforts towards peace, according to Jin10. In a communication with Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, Raisi emphasized the importance of trust in negotiations. The Iranian leader's remarks highlight the ongoing diplomatic engagements between the two countries, aiming to foster regional stability and cooperation.

data.title: Polymarket and Parti.com have entered into a strategic partnership to launch the first live prediction market.
data.description: Polymarket and Parti.com have announced a strategic partnership to launch the first product integrating real-time prediction markets into the live streaming experience. Starting today, streamers and their viewers can directly discover, follow, and trade prediction markets on Polymarket within the Parti.com platform without leaving the platform. Through this integration, content creators can search all markets offered by the Polymarket infrastructure and "pin" selected markets to the top of the live chat window, allowing viewers to instantly participate in market transactions related to the live discussion topics. The partnership also launches the Earn Program, where creators can earn a share of the transaction fees generated by their viewers in pinned markets. Furthermore, the two companies will collaborate on "Boutique Culture Markets" around trending events in the live streaming ecosystem, extending prediction markets to cultural hot topics on the digital platform; these markets are already online. Parti founder and CEO Brian Gallagher stated that prediction markets are not just financial tools, but also a new media format, and combining live streaming culture with Polymarket represents the next wave of media trends. Polymarket Chief Marketing Officer Matthew Modabber stated that live streaming is a natural extension of Polymarket's mission to build a global information layer for real-time events, and the two companies are bringing the market into the context and audiences that shape real-time narratives.

data.title: Iranian President and Pakistani Prime Minister Discuss Regional Tensions and Peace Efforts
data.description: Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi and Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif engaged in a conversation lasting over an hour to address regional tensions and explore peace initiatives. According to Jin10, the discussion focused on the current geopolitical climate and potential collaborative efforts to promote stability in the region. Both leaders emphasized the importance of dialogue and cooperation in resolving conflicts and fostering a peaceful environment. The call reflects ongoing diplomatic efforts to address regional challenges and enhance bilateral relations between Iran and Pakistan.

data.title: Study Reveals $143 Million in Abnormal Profits from Polymarket Trades
data.description: A recent study has identified over 210,000 suspicious trades on Polymarket, resulting in $143 million in abnormal profits for traders with insider information between 2024 and 2026. According to NS3.AI, the authors of the study suggest that this figure is a conservative estimate, as the methodology used may include false positives and potentially overlook some instances of suspicious trading.

data.title: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards: Targeted U.S. Support Ship Far from Oman’s Salalah Port
data.description: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards have announced that they targeted a U.S. support ship located at a considerable distance from Oman’s Salalah Port. According to Jin10, the incident highlights ongoing tensions in the region, with Iran asserting its military capabilities. The specifics of the operation and the implications for regional security remain unclear, but the announcement underscores the volatile nature of U.S.-Iran relations. The Revolutionary Guards did not provide further details on the engagement or the current status of the vessel involved.

data.title: Xinhua News Agency: California bans officials from profiting from insider information in prediction markets.
data.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom signed a law on the 27th prohibiting state officials appointed by the governor from profiting from insider information in prediction markets. The governor's office stated that some U.S. officials with apparent access to sensitive federal government information were making "extremely precise bets" in prediction markets. The statement also criticized some officials for turning public service into a means of "getting rich quick." The statement pointed out that four cases of prediction trading demonstrate that it is highly unlikely for someone lacking insider information to make such trades. The profits from these predictions ranged from tens of thousands to millions of dollars, involving multiple U.S. military actions related to Venezuela and Iran, with some predictions made just days before the actions took place or hours before. Six individuals suspected of having insider information bet on a U.S. military strike against Iran, profiting a total of $1.2 million, and they opened prediction market accounts just days before the conflict occurred. (Xinhua)

data.title: BitGo Reports $81.6 Billion in Digital Assets Under Custody
data.description: BitGo disclosed in its annual Form 10-K filing that it managed approximately $81.6 billion in digital assets as of December 31 last year. According to NS3.AI, Bitcoin constituted 49.2% of the assets under custody, while the top five assets made up 80.7% of the total holdings.
